purpose: Illustrative signed registry snapshot and cache-age fixture for stale-cache and status-check conformance tests.

snapshot.note: This snapshot predates issuer-b.example's suspension at 08:30:00Z (see fixtures/issuer-set.json). It exists specifically to drive CT-UC012-NEG-01.

verifier_cache_policy_under_test.expected_result: reject or force refresh: snapshot age (3600s) exceeds max_staleness_seconds (900s). Acceptance here is a documented non-conformance.

known_gaps: maximum staleness is illustrative; no normative ceiling has been ratified
no privacy-preserving refresh mechanism has been selected
